welcome:
🏗️ SIA «MULTISPA» — betonaveidni.lv

🇱🇻 Sveicināti! Es esmu SIA «MULTISPA» virtuālais asistents.
   Mēs piedāvājam celtniecības sastatņu un veidņu nomu un pārdošanu.

🇷🇺 Здравствуйте! Я виртуальный ассистент SIA «MULTISPA».
   Мы предлагаем аренду и продажу строительных лесов и опалубки.

🇬🇧 Hello! I am the virtual assistant of SIA «MULTISPA».
   We offer rental and sale of scaffolding and formwork.
choose_language:
🇱🇻 Kādā valodā Jums ērtāk sazināties?

timeout_message:
I can help you with:
• Equipment information (scaffolding, formwork)
• Rental prices
• Equipment selection for your project

To prepare an offer, I will need:
📐 Object type and dimensions
📅 Work timeline
📎 Drawing or project (if available)

How can I help you?
prices_info:
💰 Approximate rental prices:

🔩 Modular scaffolding — 2.20 €/m² wall + VAT / month
🔩 Facade scaffolding — 1.40 €/m² wall + VAT / month
🧱 Wall formwork (h=1.20 m) — 6.00 €/m² + VAT / week
📐 Slab formwork — 3.00 €/m² + VAT / week

⚠️ Exact price depends on the complexity of the structure.
Our specialists will prepare a detailed calculation.
